ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group's purpose or characteristics */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent group (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being promoted */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the user belongs to */,
  "promotion_month" TEXT /* Month of the promotion */,
  "home_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's home city */,
  "recommended_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended city */,
  "promotion_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the user is being promoted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of the promotion (e.g., discount, special offer) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the promotion */,
  "user_engagement" INTEGER /* User engagement with the promotion */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_home_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_promotion_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_recommended_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "interest" TEXT /* Interest of the user */,
  "preference_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the user's preference level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (e.g., admin, user)
Date of birth of the user
Date the user joined the platform
Description of the group's purpose or characteristics
ID of the parent group (if applicable)
